MINI MINUTES: JPT:Marte Bassi; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Granada Enterprise Management, LLC is present. Represented by Tony Davidauskis.
Attorney Richard Lieberman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Myles Stevens III is present.
Attorney Sinead Kelly appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The parties agree to a Settlement Protective Date to finalize a stipulation with the approval of the JPT Marte Bassi. The trial date of NOV-02-2015 is continued to NOV-09-15. (501/JPT)
